stories.headline: Peace Deal Uncertain as Iran Says Strait of Hormuz is Shut

IEA Executive Director Fatih Birol tells Chrystia Freeland that even if the Strait of Hormuz reopens soon, damage to more than 80 energy facilities could take years to repair, keeping markets volatile. stories.headline: Moscow bombards Ukraine while Kyiv targets Russian oil facilities

stories.headline: Federal Agency Probes Suspicious Oil Trades Made Before Trump Pivots
stories.summary: The top US derivatives regulator is investigating a series of suspiciously well-timed trades in the oil futures market ahead of recent policy pivots by President Donald Trump related to the war in Iran, according to people familiar with the matter. Commodity Futures Trading Commission former chairman Gary Gensler joins David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)
